title: Deliciously Crispy Saudi Arabian Chicken Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring massaman paste and a ferment process, this recipe yields resinous and crispy chicken kebabs that are kosher friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the massaman paste, yogurt, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight to ferment.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and crispy on the outside.
Serve the kebabs hot with your choice of sides, such as rice or salad.
